tasks.subject: Phase 10 - Production Hardening
tasks.description: Resolve all conditional approval findings (C001, C002, C003, O004).

tasks.subject: Phase 13 - Release Packaging & Repository Cleanup
tasks.description: Release packaging complete. Archive planning artifacts, finalize docs, validate build/test. Generate artifacts/release-readiness-summary.md with READY TO PUBLISH recommendation.

tasks.subject: Phase 15 - Package Metadata & PI Registry Compliance
tasks.description: Bring the extension package into full compliance with PI extension ecosystem requirements and npm publication best practices. Reviewed with software-engineer, reviewer, quality-engineer agents. Fixed: package.json metadata, dependencies, scripts, files field. Fixed: .pi/chain-as-agent-extension.js imports. Fixed: README.md package name. Package validated with npm pack. Generate artifacts/package-compliance-report.md with FULLY COMPLIANT recommendation.
tasks.activeForm: Package metadata & PI registry compliance complete

tasks.subject: Phase 16 - Repository Publication & Release Tagging
tasks.description: Prepare, validate, commit, tag, and push the final release to the remote Git repository. Execute: repository validation (clean working tree), release content review (source files, docs), version validation (1.0.0 semantic), final build validation (npm pack succeeds), commit preparation (release: v1.0.0 commit message), git tag creation (v1.0.0 annotated tag), push validation (branch + tag pushed successfully), GitHub release preparation (generate release notes), generate deliverable (artifacts/repository-publication-report.md, artifacts/phase-16-final.md). Note: Package requires npm 2FA authentication for publication to registry.
tasks.activeForm: Repository publication and release tagging complete
